misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 It seems like each eye Imu has in his awakened cloud has a special ability, such as healing powers, and even the ability to transform his weapon. That's incredibly powerful, especially s
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 It seems like each eye Imu has in his awakened cloud has a special ability, such as healing powers, and even the ability to transform his weapon. That's incredibly powerful, especially since he hasn't even used his magic book or Haki... Dude is a beast.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Details to Imu vs Sanji - Sanji attacks Imu with a kick but Imu blocks it with the sole of his foot (Imu is about the same size as Kaidou, Big Mom, Kuma...). Then Imu turns around and ki
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Details to Imu vs Sanji - Sanji attacks Imu with a kick but Imu blocks it with the sole of his foot (Imu is about the same size as Kaidou, Big Mom, Kuma...). Then Imu turns around and kicks Sanji with his leg coated in black flames. It creates a huge explosion and we don't know what happens to Sanji.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Details to Imu vs Zoro - Zoro attacks Imu with “Enou Santōryū: Rengoku Oni Giri”, but Imu blocks it easily with the tip of his tail. - Imu creates a little black flame in the palm of his
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Details to Imu vs Zoro - Zoro attacks Imu with “Enou Santōryū: Rengoku Oni Giri”, but Imu blocks it easily with the tip of his tail. - Imu creates a little black flame in the palm of his hand called “Omen” and shoots it to Zoro's head, making him lies down with blood on his head like being hit by a bullet. Imu then uses “Omen” on Hajrudin but this time it turns to a huge explosion.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Details on Gunko "Two black bird-like wings emerge from Imu's back, then he flies to Gunko with them. The flame on Imu' spear transforms into a cannon, which fires a black fire (that has
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Details on Gunko "Two black bird-like wings emerge from Imu's back, then he flies to Gunko with them. The flame on Imu' spear transforms into a cannon, which fires a black fire (that has eyes and mouth) at the ice block where Gunko is, creating another huge explosion."

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Imu vs Loki!!! Imu: "Mu is looking for the culprit behind the murder of my servant Harald... 14 years ago..." Loki: "He wasn't your servant or anything!! The name Harald belongs to my fa
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Imu vs Loki!!! Imu: "Mu is looking for the culprit behind the murder of my servant Harald... 14 years ago..." Loki: "He wasn't your servant or anything!! The name Harald belongs to my father!! And he was once the “King of Elbaph”!!!" - Then, in the ABSOLUTELY EPIC final double page of the chapter, Loki comes face to face with Imu. Loki is very angry and he's carrying Ragnir hammer. Furthermore, the area is filled with dark clouds and lightning. Loki: "And I am also the guy you are looking for!!" Imu: "Much hardship would've been avoided if thou aren't here..." Loki: "Elbaph is the one place I’d be!!! Hammer that into your brain, idiot!!" Source: Redon
